title: Prince Pipes Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Prince Pipes Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes Capital India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes Capital India:
Prince Pipes Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
